title: ourisia biflora
intro: Ourisia biflora, also known as the forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat coughs, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ourisia biflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. The herbal preparations of Ourisia biflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
